headline: Bad News for XRP and Bitcoin Investors. Retail Investors are Fleeing Crypto.
summary: On Bloomberg Tech, live from San Francisco today, a venture capital investor laid out a striking thesis about what’s actually happening inside the cryptocurrency markets. Retail investors now make up 70% of crypto markets, down from 90%, while institutional participation has climbed from 10% of the digital asset economy to between 20-30%. The shift is ... Bad News for XRP and Bitcoin Investors. Retail Investors are Fleeing Crypto.

headline: Traders Fully Bet on Fed Rate Hike This Year After Jobs Data
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Traders in the $31 trillion Treasuries market fully priced in a Federal Reserve interest-rate hike by the end of this year after US job growth topped all forecasts in May, spurring yields higher.Most Read from BloombergSpaceX, Other Mega IPOs Denied Fast Index Entry by S&PSaylor’s Bitcoin Machine Is Misfiring on Every Cylinder‘Sell Indonesia’ Sweeps Trading Desks as Prabowo Tightens GripGlazer Family Members Study Manchester United Stake SaleBloomberg Retracts Incorrect Story on R

headline: Assessing BlackRock (BLK) Valuation After Its $25 Million Future Builders Workforce Initiative Announcement
summary: BlackRock’s workforce push and why it matters for shareholders BlackRock (BLK) has launched a $25 million Request for Proposals under its $100 million Future Builders initiative, targeting nonprofits that connect Americans with skilled trades roles across critical infrastructure sectors. This move puts workforce development and economic opportunity at the center of BlackRock’s current story. It raises questions about how a large philanthropic effort might sit alongside the company’s asset...

headline: Why The Narrative Around BlackRock (BLK) Is Shifting After Mixed Analyst Target Resets
summary: BlackRock’s latest fair value estimate has been nudged down slightly, with the central price target moving from US$1,255.00 to US$1,251.25. That kind of fine tuning mirrors what you are seeing across recent Street research, where some firms are lifting targets and others are cutting them as they rethink assumptions on flows, earnings power, and how asset managers should be valued. Read on to see what is driving these adjustments and how you can keep track of the evolving narrative around...

headline: BlackRock: Net Flows Strong In Q1, But Overvaluation In Question

headline: Elizabeth Warren Says Private Equity Wants To Profit From AI—And Stick Consumers With The Bill
summary: Warren warned private equity firms could pass AI-driven grid upgrade costs onto consumers through higher power bills.
